name: [TEMPLATE] [seo_improver_plugin] SEO Improver — DataForSEO → movement → heuristics → notify

nodes.name: Spend Read
nodes.notes: PAT-4 guard: body may be an empty HTTP 200 — never JSON.parse blind. Use: const t=(response.body??'').toString(); t.trim()?JSON.parse(t):[]

nodes.name: DataForSEO Pull

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify([{ target: $json.__property, location_name: $json.__locale, language_name: 'English', item_types: ['organic'], limit: 100, order_by: ['ranked_serp_element.serp_item.rank_absolute,asc'] }]) }}

nodes.notes: PAT-4 guard: body may be an empty HTTP 200 — never JSON.parse blind. Use: const t=(response.body??'').toString(); t.trim()?JSON.parse(t):[]

nodes.name: Write Snapshots

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify(($json.__movement || []).map((r) => ({ tenant: $json.__tenant, property: $json.__property, run_date: $json.__run_date, keyword: r.keyword, locale: r.locale, device: r.device, ranking_url: r.ranking_url, position: r.position, previous_position: r.previous_position, delta: r.delta, avg_position: r.position, status: r.status }))) }}

nodes.notes: PAT-4 guard: body may be an empty HTTP 200 — never JSON.parse blind. Use: const t=(response.body??'').toString(); t.trim()?JSON.parse(t):[]

nodes.name: Write Findings

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify(($json.__findings || []).map((f) => ({ tenant: $json.__tenant, finding_id: f.finding_id, class: f.class, target_keyword: f.target_keyword, target_url: f.target_url, recommendation: f.recommendation, evidence: f.evidence, created_run: $json.__run_date, status: "open", updated_at: new Date().toISOString() }))) }}
